signals.headline: Fed Signals Rate-Cut Pause at Upcoming 2026 Meeting Amid Strong Economic Data and Leadership Uncertainty | YES | HIGH co
signals.raw:
Fed Signals Rate-Cut Pause at Upcoming 2026 Meeting Amid Strong Economic Data and Leadership Uncertainty | YES | HIGH confidence**

Economic indicators, including a 4.4% unemployment rate in December (down from 4.6% in November), 50,000 jobs added, and upwardly revised Q3 GDP growth to 4.4%, strongly support the Federal Reserve maintaining unchanged interest rates at its first 2026 policy meeting

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Boosts Crypto Sentiment: Solana and Ethereum Up 5-7% Weekly | YES | MED confidence**
